title: hyoscyamus ceratophyllus
intro: Hyoscyamus ceratophyllus, also known as the stinking or moth ball nightshade, is a plant species within the family Solanaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anticholinergic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hyoscyamus ceratophyllus include relief from muscle spasms, menstrual cramps, and other symptoms associated with anxiety and stress, as well as its potential to improve sleep quality. Hyoscyamus ceratophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for oral consumption, or used topically in creams and ointments for local relief.
